primary_sources.title: Nobody buys a garden hose for fun. You buy one because one day you wake up and suddenly you care about lawn care. The Pippin Garden Hose brief. Enter your #RunwayBigAdContest spot today. Up to $100K in cash prizes. Learn more at the link below.

Submissions for the 2026 AI Festival are now open until April 20th. This year's festival will celebrate works utilizing AI across Film, Design, New Media, Fashion, Advertising and Gaming. Learn more and submit your project at the link below.

supporting_sources.title: It’s now easier to find, reuse, and build on the files you upload and create in ChatGPT. You can quickly reference files in a chat using recent files in the toolbar, ask ChatGPT about something you’ve uploaded, or browse your files in the new Library tab in the web sidebar. Rolling out globally for Plus, Pro, and Business users, and coming soon to users in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK.
苹果公司曾计划收购 最强Halide 相机应用（Lux Optics），以增强 iPhone 18 Pro 的相机功能。 苹果将可变光圈摄像头引入 iPhone 18 Pro，增强默认的相机像专业相机一样。 但交易最终未能达成。不过，Halide 的联合创始人（设计师）已加入苹果的设计团队。
PrismAudio：视频生成音效 阿里开源的模型，输入视频，自动生成跟画面匹配的音效。效果还不错。 项目地址：https://prismaudio-project.github.io/ 模型：https://huggingface.co/FunAudioLLM/PrismAudio
